official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound low_disk_space_warning singleton fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official empty singleton body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns low_disk_space_warning to packet id 0x32.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the low_disk_space_warning id to ClientboundLowDiskSpaceWarningPacket.
The official low_disk_space_warning body is empty through a singleton unit codec.
The fixture does not require initialized disk-warning UI state, Level, or game state.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer disk warning UI behavior, client storage state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
